name: Rajesh — Senior PM at a 5,000-person enterprise

goals: keep an auditable trail from requirement to test
reduce onboarding time for rotating team members
frustrations: traceability lives in spreadsheets nobody updates
cloud AI tools are blocked by security
profile.behaviour: Reads carefully, tests edge cases, asks 'what happens when this goes wrong'. Will not adopt anything his security team would flag.
profile.technicalAbility: medium — fluent in Jira and Confluence, not in terminals
profile.riskTolerance: low — a tool failing in front of stakeholders is a career event
profile.preferredWorkflow: structured documents, versioning, sign-offs, exportable artifacts
profile.budgetSensitivity: low personally — but procurement needs a business case and a security review
profile.decisionStyle: pilots with 2 colleagues for a month, then writes a recommendation memo
